**AutoGen** is Microsoft Research's multi-agent conversation framework. Production deployments via the v0.4 stable release. MIT licensed. Maintained release cadence with monthly minors.

What it adds: explicit agent-to-agent conversation primitives, a planner/critic memory model, and tool use through structured function calls. Differs from single-orchestrator frameworks by treating agents as first-class peers.

- [official] https://microsoft.github.io/autogen/
- [benchmark] AgentBench results recorded in release notes.
- [field report] customer-support deployment write-up.
